title: puck: rak4631 overlay references undefined lora0
description: Discovered while validating project-LICHEN-9nrr.3. west build -b rak4631/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck -d build/puck_rak4631 --pristine=always fails during devicetree generation before app compilation: lichen/apps/puck/boards/rak4631_nrf52840.overlay references node label lora0 at line 24, but the board devicetree does not define that label in this workspace. Scope: update the RAK4631 puck overlay to bind the configured LoRa radio using the board's actual SPI/SX12xx node label or add the missing node, preserving intended SX12xx radio behavior. Acceptance: west build -b rak4631/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck configures and compiles; devicetree chosen/alias usage is documented or follows nearby board patterns; no unrelated puck behavior changes.
close_reason: Completed: updated RAK4631 puck overlay to use the actual &lora node label and current zephyr,uart-pipe chosen property, removed unsupported LoRa DT properties, fixed board Kconfig symbols/dependencies for SPI, SX1262, SLIP, and verified west build -b rak4631/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck compiles and links. Filed follow-up for USB VID/PID warnings; non-native unused warnings already tracked.
